mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that reduces discount rates for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in unemployment rate above 9.5% signals deteriorating labor market conditions, prompting risk-off behavior that drives S&P 500 forward returns lower over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or UNRATE's predictive power loses significance (p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in inflation (CPIAUCSL) and rising federal funds rate (FEDFUNDS) create a 'tightening' environment that compresses equity multiples, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over 60 days.
failure_condition: Interaction effect reverses direction (positive returns in 60d horizon despite signal), or pairwise correlations between proxies drop below 0.4.

mechanism_narrative: A quarterly decline in GDP (GDPC1) signals economic contraction, triggering defensive positioning that reduces S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX shows positive 60d returns in 60%+ of GDP contraction periods, or GDPC1's predictive power weakens (IC < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Strong monthly payroll growth (PAYEMS) indicates robust labor market conditions, supporting equity earnings growth and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 50% of instances with PAYEMS growth > 100k, or signal IC falls below 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent increases in industrial production (INDPRO) and housing starts (HOUST) signal strong economic activity, driving S&P 500 forward returns higher over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Interaction effect breaks down (returns < 0.5% in 70%+ of cases), or proxies diverge (correlation < 0.3).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly drop in residential sales (RSAFS) below 340k signals weak housing demand, creating downward pressure on equity valuations and negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: SPX shows positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances, or RSAFS's predictive power declines (p > 0.15).

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in industrial production (INDPRO) indicates weakening supply-side dynamics, prompting risk-off behavior that reduces S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX shows positive 60d returns in 60%+ of INDPRO decline periods, or signal IC falls below 0.03.
